message:
fix(messaging): gate e-process reset on Alert state to prevent spurious resets at confidence cap

src/messaging/service.rs — The QuantitativeContractMonitor was
unconditionally resetting the e-process whenever the confidence level
was capped, even during non-alert conditions. This caused the monitor to
lose accumulated evidence that had not yet triggered an alert. Now gates
e-process creation on both the confidence cap being hit AND the alert
state being Alert, preventing spurious resets during normal monitoring
when the cap is reached transiently.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
